active_tasks.description:
Iron-Rich Foods (supports oxygen transport, prevents fatigue)
	•	Red meat (beef, lamb)
	•	Chicken (especially thighs)
	•	Spinach (cooked or raw)
	•	Lentils
	•	Chickpeas
	•	Black beans
	•	Pumpkin seeds
	•	Fortified cereals (like Cheerios or Total)
	•	Quinoa
	•	Tofu
	•	Dark chocolate (70%+ in small amounts)

Boost absorption: Pair with foods rich in Vitamin C (see below)

⸻

🍊 Vitamin C-Rich Foods (helps absorb iron + supports immunity)
	•	Strawberries
	•	Oranges or mandarins
	•	Kiwi
	•	Bell peppers (especially red/yellow)
	•	Broccoli
	•	Tomatoes
	•	Pineapple
	•	Mango
	•	Brussels sprouts

⸻

🧂 Magnesium-Rich Foods (muscle recovery + nerve function)
	•	Almonds
	•	Cashews
	•	Peanut butter
	•	Spinach
	•	Black beans
	•	Avocado
	•	Banana
	•	Oats
	•	Whole wheat bread or pasta
	•	Edamame
	•	Dark chocolate

⸻

🍌 Potassium-Rich Foods (hydration + heart health)
	•	Bananas
	•	Sweet potatoes
	•	White potatoes (with skin)
	•	Avocado
	•	Cantaloupe
	•	Oranges
	•	Yogurt
	•	Beans (white beans, lentils, kidney beans)

⸻

🦴 Calcium-Rich Foods (strong bones + growth)
	•	Milk
	•	Yogurt
	•	Cheese
	•	Fortified almond/oat/soy milk
	•	Tofu (calcium-set)
	•	Chia seeds
	•	Broccoli
	•	Kale
	•	Sardines or canned salmon with bones
	•	Tahini

⸻

🌞 Vitamin D Sources (helps calcium absorption + immune function)
	•	Fortified dairy or plant milks
	•	Fortified cereals
	•	Eggs (yolks)
	•	Salmon
	•	Canned tuna
	•	Sunlight exposure (20 mins/day without sunscreen is usually sufficient)

⸻

🧠 Omega-3s (brain health + joint support)
	•	Salmon
	•	Tuna
	•	Sardines
	•	Walnuts
	•	Chia seeds
	•	Ground flaxseed
	•	Omega-3-fortified eggs
	•	Optional: Kids’ omega-3 gummy supplement

Cod w/ string beans & yuca fries
active_tasks.description:
## **Simple Lemon-Garlic Cod with String Beans**

*(Yuca fries reheated on the side)*

### **Ingredients**

- Cod fillets
- Olive oil
- Salt & black pepper
- Garlic (1–2 cloves, or garlic powder)
- Lemon (or lemon juice)
- Butter (optional but recommended)
- String beans
- Optional finish: parsley, dill, or a squeeze of lemon

---

## **Step 1: Reheat the yuca fries (hands-off)**

**Oven method (best texture):**

- Oven to **400°F**
- Spread yuca fries on a sheet pan
- Bake **12–15 minutes**, flipping once if needed
    → They can stay warm while you cook the fish

---

## **Step 2: Blister the string beans**

1. Heat a wide pan over **medium-high**
2. Add **olive oil**
3. Add string beans in a single layer
4. Let them sit **undisturbed 2–3 minutes** to get a little char
5. Stir, season with **salt + pepper**
6. Add a tiny splash of water, cover **1–2 minutes** to finish cooking
7. Optional: finish with lemon or a small pat of butter

Remove to a plate and keep warm.

---

## **Step 3: Cook the cod (simple + juicy)**

Use the **same pan** (wipe if needed).

1. Lower heat to **medium**
2. Add olive oil + small pat of butter
3. Season cod with **salt & pepper**
4. Place cod in pan (presentation side down first)
5. Cook **3–4 minutes**, don’t move it
6. Flip gently, cook **2–3 minutes more**
7. Add garlic for the last 30 seconds (so it doesn’t burn)
8. Finish with **lemon squeeze**

Cod should flake easily but still be moist.

---

## **Optional quick sauce (30 seconds)**

If you want a little something:

- Deglaze pan with **1–2 Tbsp lemon juice**
- Swirl in **tiny knob of butter**
- Spoon over fish

---

## **Timing (total ~25 minutes)**

- Yuca fries: 12–15 min (oven)
- String beans: 6–8 min
- Cod: 6–7 min
